raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a XX/XX/XXXXXXXX TV from Best Buy on XX/XX/scrub> 2026. The box contained a completely different TV ( a XXXX XXXX ) when opened. I disputed the charge of {$270.00} under the Fair Credit Billing Act as merchandise not as described. Citibank denied my dispute, incorrectly classifying it as a manufacturer warranty issue. It is not a warranty claim. I received a different brand of product entirely. I have photographic evidence. I have sent a formal written rebuttal via certified mail but am filing this complaint as the denial was improper under the XXXX.
